name: Data Agent Deployment
description: Deploy a Fabric Data Agent for natural-language data exploration over the HorizonBooks Semantic Model. Requires F64+ capacity (not available on trial).

tasks.name: Resolve Folder
tasks.description: Look up or create the '05 - Analytics' workspace folder to organize the Data Agent alongside the Semantic Model and Report.

tasks.name: Create Data Agent
tasks.description: Create HorizonBooks DataAgent item via POST /workspaces/{id}/items with type DataAgent. Requires F64+ capacity.

tasks.name: Move to Folder
tasks.description: Move DataAgent to the '05 - Analytics' workspace folder for consistent organization.

tasks.name: Manual Configuration
tasks.description: User must open the Data Agent in Fabric portal: add HorizonBooksModel as data source, configure AI instructions for natural-language queries.
